blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 18 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,782 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
